message:
test(golden,bd-5fiqq): freeze remaining 7 RobotTopic plain-text surfaces

Pre-fix: tests/golden_robot_docs.rs covered 4 of 11 RobotTopic enum
variants (src/lib.rs:1552) — exit-codes, env, paths, schemas. The
other 7 (commands, guide, examples, contracts, wrap, sources,
analytics) emitted bounded plain-text via render_*_docs helpers in
src/lib.rs but had no frozen golden, so silent reword/reorder/drop
on any of them would slip past CI.

Adds 7 new tests + 7 golden files following the existing pattern
(capture_docs(topic) → assert_golden('robot_docs/{topic}.txt.golden')
with [TEST_HOME] scrubbing). All 11 RobotTopic surfaces now have
frozen LLM-facing contracts.

Validation: rch test pass — 12/12 (4 original + 7 new + robot_help),
0 failed, 36s build, exit=0. Goldens captured under UPDATE_GOLDENS=1
then verified against the freshly written goldens in the same run.

Closes coding_agent_session_search-5fiqq.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,118 @@
+analytics:
+
+# cass analytics — Token, Tool, and Model Analytics
+
+## Subcommands
+  status    Row counts, freshness, coverage, drift warnings
+  tokens    Token usage over time with dimensional breakdowns
+  tools     Per-tool invocation counts and derived metrics
+  models    Top models by usage and coverage statistics
+  rebuild   Rebuild/backfill rollup tables with progress output
+  validate  Check rollup invariants and detect data drift
+
+## Shared Flags (all subcommands)
+  --since <ISO>        Filter from date (YYYY-MM-DD or full timestamp)
+  --until <ISO>        Filter to date
+  --days <N>           Filter to last N days
+  --agent <slug>       Filter by agent (repeatable)
+  --workspace <path>   Filter by workspace (repeatable)
+  --source <name>      Filter by source ('local', 'remote', hostname)
+  --json / --robot     Machine-readable JSON output
+  --data-dir <path>    Override data directory
+
+## Bucketed Subcommands (tokens, tools, models)
+  --group-by <bucket>  hour | day (default) | week | month
+
+## JSON Envelope (all subcommands)
+  { "command": "analytics/<sub>", "data": {...}, "_meta": {...} }
+  _meta: { elapsed_ms: u64, filters_applied: [string], data_dir: string|null }
+
+## Per-Subcommand JSON Schemas
+
+### analytics status
+  data.tables: [{ table, exists, row_count, min_day_id, max_day_id, last_updated }]
+  data.coverage: { total_messages, message_metrics_coverage_pct, api_token_coverage_pct,
+                   model_name_coverage_pct, estimate_only_pct }
+  data.drift: { signals: [{ signal, detail, severity }], track_a_fresh, track_b_fresh }
+  data.recommended_action: string
+
+### analytics tokens
+  data.buckets: [{ bucket: string, counts: {...}, content_tokens: {...},
+                   api_tokens: {...}, plan: {...}, derived: {...} }]
+  data.totals: <same shape as bucket>
+  data.source_table: string  ('usage_daily' | 'usage_hourly' | 'messages' | 'message_metrics')
+  data.granularity: string   ('hour' | 'day' | 'week' | 'month')
+  Bucket keys: counts.{message_count, user_message_count, assistant_message_count,
+    tool_call_count, plan_message_count}; api_tokens.{total, input, output,
+    cache_read, cache_creation, thinking}; derived.{api_coverage_pct,
+    avg_api_per_message, avg_content_per_message}
+
+### analytics tools
+  data.rows: [{ key: string, tool_call_count, message_count, api_tokens_total,
+               tool_calls_per_1k_api_tokens, tool_calls_per_1k_content_tokens }]
+  data.totals: { tool_call_count, message_count, api_tokens_total,
+                 overall_per_1k_api_tokens }
+  data.row_count: int
+  data._meta.source_table: ('usage_daily' | 'usage_hourly' | 'message_metrics')
+  --limit N (default 20): caps returned rows
+
+### analytics models
+  data.by_api_tokens: { dim, metric, rows: [{ key, value, message_count, ... }] }
+  data.timeseries: <same as analytics tokens>
+  data.by_api_tokens._meta.source_table: string  ('token_daily_stats' | 'token_usage')
+    Usually token_daily_stats; token_usage when filters require raw provenance recovery.
+  Models only available for connectors that report model names
+    (claude_code, codex, pi_agent, factory, opencode, cursor).
+
+### analytics rebuild
+  data.track: string ('a')
+  data.tracks_rebuilt: [string]
+  data.track_a: { message_metrics_rows, usage_hourly_rows, usage_daily_rows,
+                  usage_models_daily_rows, elapsed_ms, rows_per_sec }
+  data.overall_elapsed_ms: u64
+  --force: rebuild even when rollups appear fresh
+
+### analytics validate
+  data.summary: { errors, warnings, drift_entries, buckets_checked, buckets_total }
+  data.checks: [{ id, ok, severity, details, suggested_action? }]
+    Check IDs: track_a.tables_exist, track_a.{content_tokens,message_count,
+      api_tokens,api_coverage}_match, track_b.tables_exist,
+      track_b.{tokens,agents}_match, cross_track.drift, non_negative.counters
+  data.drift: [{ day_id, agent_slug, source_id, track_a_total,
+                 track_b_total, delta, delta_pct, likely_cause }]
+  data.perf: { timeseries: { elapsed_ms, budget_ms, within_budget, error?, details },
+              breakdown: { elapsed_ms, budget_ms, within_budget, error?, details } }
+  --fix: run deep validation, rebuild safe Track A rollups when possible, and report skipped non-fixable issues
+
+## Coverage & Uncertainty Semantics
+  - api_token_coverage_pct: % of messages with API token data (from Claude, Codex).
+  - estimate_only_pct: % of messages with content-estimated tokens only (chars/4 heuristic).
+  - When coverage is low, derived metrics are unreliable estimates, not ground truth.
+  - Content token estimates are always available (heuristic); API tokens are sparse.
+
+## Exit Codes
+  0  Success
+  2  Usage error (invalid flags, missing required args)
+  3  Missing database (run 'cass index --full' first)
+  9  Database error (corrupt, missing tables, query failure)
+
+## Retry Guidance
+  exit 9 + retryable=true: transient DB lock/busy — retry after 1s
+  exit 9 + retryable=false: schema or data issue — run 'cass analytics rebuild' first
+  exit 3: no database — run 'cass index --full' to create it
+  validate errors: use 'cass analytics validate --fix --json' for safe Track A repair, or 'cass analytics rebuild --force --json' for a manual rebuild loop
+
+## Common Workflows
+  # Quick health check
+  cass analytics status --json | jq '.data.coverage'
+
+  # Recent usage by agent for last 7 days
+  cass analytics tokens --days 7 --json | jq '.data.buckets'
+
+  # Tool usage top-10
+  cass analytics tools --limit 10 --json | jq '.data.rows'
+
+  # Validation + remediation loop
+  cass analytics validate --json | jq '.data.summary'
+  # If errors: rebuild then re-validate
+  cass analytics rebuild --force --json && cass analytics validate --json

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+commands:
+  (global) --quiet / -q  Suppress info logs (auto-enabled in robot mode)
+  (global) --verbose/-v  Enable debug logs (overrides auto-quiet)
+  Tip: `--robot-docs=<topic>` is normalized to `robot-docs <topic>`; globals can appear before/after subcommands.
+  cass search <query> [OPTIONS]
+    --agent A         Filter by agent (codex, claude_code, gemini, vibe, opencode, amp, cline)
+    --workspace W     Filter by workspace path
+    --limit N         Max results (default: 0 = no limit)
+    --offset N        Pagination offset (default: 0)
+    --json | --robot  JSON output for automation
+    --fields F1,F2    Select specific fields in hits (reduces token usage)
+                      Presets: minimal (path,line,agent), summary (+title,score), provenance (source_id,origin_kind,origin_host)
+                      Fields: score,agent,workspace,workspace_original,source_path,snippet,content,title,created_at,line_number,match_type,source_id,origin_kind,origin_host
+    --max-content-length N  Truncate content/snippet/title to N chars (UTF-8 safe, adds '...')
+                            Adds *_truncated: true indicator for each truncated field
+    --today           Filter to today only
+    --yesterday       Filter to yesterday only
+    --week            Filter to last 7 days
+    --days N          Filter to last N days
+    --since DATE      Filter from date (YYYY-MM-DD)
+    --until DATE      Filter to date (YYYY-MM-DD)
+    --aggregate F1,F2 Server-side aggregation by fields (agent,workspace,date,match_type)
+                      Returns buckets with counts. Reduces tokens by ~99% for overview queries
+    --mode lexical|semantic|hybrid  Search mode (default: hybrid; hybrid fails open to lexical when semantic assets are unavailable)
+    --robot-meta     Include readiness, requested/realized mode, semantic refinement, fallback tier/reason, cursor, and timing metadata
+  cass stats [--json] [--data-dir DIR]
+  cass status [--json] [--stale-threshold N] [--data-dir DIR]
+  cass diag [--json] [--verbose] [--data-dir DIR]
+  cass sessions [--workspace DIR] [--current] [--limit N] [--json]
+  cass view <path> [-n LINE] [-C CONTEXT] [--json]
+  cass index [--full] [--watch] [--json] [--data-dir DIR]
+                    In --json mode, NDJSON events stream on stderr:
+                      {event:started|phase|progress|completed|error, ...}
+                    Tune with --progress-interval-ms N (250..60000, default 2000),
+                    disable with --no-progress-events or CASS_INDEX_NO_PROGRESS_EVENTS=1.
+                    From another shell: `cass status --json` shows live progress.
+  cass tui [--once] [--data-dir DIR] [--reset-state] [--asciicast FILE]
+  cass capabilities [--json]
+  cass robot-docs <topic>
+  cass --robot-help

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+contracts:
+  stdout data-only; stderr diagnostics/progress.
+  No implicit TUI when automation flags set or stdout non-TTY.
+  Color auto off when non-TTY unless forced.
+  Use --quiet to silence info logs in robot runs.
+  JSON errors only to stderr.

@@ -0,0 +1,67 @@
+examples:
+
+# Basic search with JSON output for agents
+  cass search "your query" --robot
+  # Default is hybrid-preferred; add --robot-meta to see realized mode and lexical fallback reasons.
+  cass search "your query" --robot --robot-meta
+# Token-budgeted search with cursor + request-id
+  cass search "error" --robot --max-tokens 200 --request-id run-1 --limit 2 --robot-meta
+  cass search "error" --robot --cursor <_meta.next_cursor> --request-id run-1b --robot-meta
+
+# Search with time filters
+  cass search "bug" --today                 # today only
+  cass search "api" --week                  # last 7 days
+  cass search "feature" --days 30           # last 30 days
+  cass search "fix" --since 2025-01-01      # since date
+  cass search "error" --robot --limit 5 --offset 5  # paginate robot output
+
+# Filter by agent or workspace
+  cass search "error" --agent codex         # codex sessions only
+  cass search "test" --workspace /myproject # specific project
+
+# Discover session files for follow-up actions
+  cass sessions --current --json             # best match for current cwd
+  cass sessions --workspace /myproject --json --limit 5
+
+# Follow up on search results
+  cass view /path/to/session.jsonl -n 42   # view line 42 with context
+  cass view /path/to/session.jsonl -n 42 -C 10  # 10 lines context
+
+# Get index statistics
+  cass stats --json                        # JSON stats
+  cass stats                               # Human-readable stats
+
+# Aggregation (overview queries - 99% token reduction)
+  cass search "error" --json --aggregate agent    # count by agent
+  cass search "*" --json --aggregate agent,workspace  # multi-field agg
+  cass search "bug" --json --aggregate date --week  # time distribution
+
+# Quick health check (ideal for agents)
+  cass status --json                       # health check JSON
+  cass health --json                       # fast readiness + recommended_action
+  cass status --stale-threshold 3600       # custom stale threshold (1hr)
+
+# Diagnostics
+  cass diag --json                         # JSON diagnostic info
+  cass diag --verbose                      # Human-readable with sizes
+
+# Persistently exclude a noisy harness from indexing
+  cass sources agents list --json         # inspect exclusions
+  cass sources agents exclude openclaw    # block future indexing, purge archived local data
+  cass sources agents exclude openclaw --keep-indexed-data  # block future indexing only
+  cass sources agents include openclaw    # re-enable indexing
+
+# Capabilities introspection (for agent self-configuration)
+  cass capabilities --json                 # JSON with version, features, limits
+  cass capabilities                        # Human-readable summary
+
+# Full workflow
+  cass index --full                        # index all sessions
+  cass search "cma-es" --robot             # search
+  cass view <source_path> -n <line>        # examine result
+
+# TUI drill-in quick reference
+  cass tui                                 # interactive mode
+  # Enter on selected result -> detail modal (Messages tab default)
+  # Enter with no selected hit -> query submit behavior
+  # In modal: / find, n/N next/prev, Esc exits find then closes modal, F8 opens in editor

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+guide:
+  Robot-mode handbook: docs/ROBOT_MODE.md (automation quickstart)
+  Output: --robot/--json; formats via --robot-format json|jsonl|compact|toon
+  Logging: INFO auto-suppressed in robot mode; add -v to re-enable
+  Search contract: SQLite is source of truth; lexical is the required self-healing fast path; semantic is opportunistic enrichment.
+  Default search: hybrid-preferred. With --robot-meta, inspect requested_search_mode, search_mode, semantic_refinement, fallback_tier, and fallback_reason.
+  Readiness: cass health/status JSON recommended_action is authoritative; lexical-only fallback can be normal while semantic assets catch up.
+  Args: accepts --robot-docs=topic and misplaced globals; detailed errors with examples on parse failure
+  Source control: use `cass robot-docs sources` for remote sync/setup plus persistent agent-harness exclusions
+  TUI drill-in contract: Enter on selected hit opens detail modal (Messages tab); Enter with no selected hit falls back to query submit behavior
+  Detail modal shortcuts: / opens find, n/N cycles matches, Esc exits find then closes modal, F8 opens selected hit in $EDITOR
+  Safety: prefer --color=never in non-TTY; use --trace-file for spans; reset TUI via `cass tui --reset-state`
+  Quick refs: cass --robot-help | cass robot-docs commands | cass robot-docs examples | cass robot-docs sources

@@ -0,0 +1,90 @@
+sources:
+
+# Persisted agent indexing exclusions
+Use this when you want cass to ignore a connector entirely even if
+the backing session files still exist on disk.
+
+  cass sources agents list
+  cass sources agents list --json
+  cass sources agents exclude openclaw
+  cass sources agents exclude openclaw --keep-indexed-data
+  cass sources agents include openclaw
+
+Configuration is persisted in ~/.config/cass/sources.toml as:
+  disabled_agents = ["openclaw"]
+By default, `exclude` also purges already archived local data for that agent
+and rebuilds lexical search from the remaining archive. Use
+`--keep-indexed-data` if you only want to block future indexing.
+Exclusions apply to future local scans, remote mirror scans, and watch mode.
+
+# cass sources setup - Interactive Remote Sources Wizard
+
+## Overview
+The setup wizard automates configuring cass to search across multiple machines.
+It discovers SSH hosts from ~/.ssh/config, checks their status, and handles
+installation, indexing, and configuration automatically.
+
+## Quick Start
+  cass sources setup                    # Interactive (recommended)
+  cass sources setup --hosts css,csd    # Configure specific hosts
+  cass sources setup --dry-run          # Preview without changes
+  cass sources setup --resume           # Resume interrupted setup
+
+## Workflow Phases
+  1. Discovery  - Parses ~/.ssh/config to find configured hosts
+  2. Probing    - Connects via SSH to check cass status and agent data
+  3. Selection  - Interactive selection of which hosts to configure
+  4. Install    - Installs cass on hosts without it (optional)
+  5. Indexing   - Runs `cass index` on remotes (optional)
+  6. Config     - Generates sources.toml entries
+  7. Sync       - Downloads session data to local machine (optional)
+
+## Flags Reference
+  --hosts <names>      Only configure these hosts (comma-separated SSH aliases)
+  --dry-run            Preview without making changes
+  --resume             Resume from ~/.cache/cass/setup_state.json
+  --non-interactive    Skip prompts, use auto-detected defaults
+  --skip-install       Don't install cass on remotes
+  --skip-index         Don't run remote indexing
+  --skip-sync          Don't sync after setup
+  --json               Output progress as JSON for scripting
+  --timeout <secs>     SSH connection timeout (default: 10)
+  --verbose            Show detailed progress
+
+## Non-Interactive Usage (Scripting)
+  cass sources setup --non-interactive --hosts css,csd
+  cass sources setup --non-interactive --hosts css --skip-install --skip-index
+  cass sources setup --json --hosts css  # JSON output for parsing
+
+## State and Resume
+State saved to ~/.cache/cass/setup_state.json on interruption.
+Resume with: cass sources setup --resume
+
+## Generated Configuration
+The wizard generates sources.toml entries like:
+  [[sources]]
+  name = "css"
+  type = "ssh"
+  host = "css"
+  paths = ["~/.claude/projects", "~/.codex/sessions"]
+  sync_schedule = "manual"
+  [[sources.path_mappings]]
+  from = "/data/projects"
+  to = "/Users/username/projects"
+
+## After Setup
+  cass search "query"       # Search across all sources
+  cass sources sync --all   # Sync latest data
+  cass sources list         # List configured sources
+
+## Troubleshooting
+  "Host unreachable": Verify SSH config with `ssh <host>` manually
+  "Permission denied": Load SSH key with `ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_rsa`
+  "cargo not found": Use --skip-install and install manually
+  "Index taking too long": Large histories take time; runs in background
+
+## Related Commands
+  cass sources list         List configured sources
+  cass sources sync         Sync data from sources
+  cass sources discover     Just discover hosts (no setup)
+  cass sources add          Manually add a source

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+wrap:
+  Default: no forced wrap (wide output).
+  --wrap <n>: wrap informational text to n columns.
+  --nowrap: force no wrapping even if wrap set elsewhere.
